captures.caption: Park the ship in the enemies' lane and hold fire: kills bank up, the tenth flips the W readout to 2 with a chirp over the explosion, and from there every enemy falls twice as fast.
captures.alt: Mid-game: the white ship near the bottom holding its column, green enemies falling, the score and lives readouts at the corners and a white W wave readout at the top centre.

captures.caption: The title screen, no longer silent: Twinkle Twinkle, Little Star on SID voice 1, looping under the scrolling starfield until fire is pressed.
captures.alt: The STARFIELD title screen with PRESS FIRE below it and stars drifting past.
